signals.headline: Cavaliers defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, take 2-0 series lead** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, take 2-0 series lead** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][3]

Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points with 7 rebounds and 5 assists, James Harden added 28 points on 9-14 FG, and Scottie Barnes led Toronto with 26 points in the loss[1][3]. This outcome, from tonight's game in Cleveland, shifts playoff series prediction markets favoring Cleveland's advancement[1][2][3].
